summary: A CBP officer (Monica Williams) introduces her crisis-response/wellness K9 'Izzy' in a subtitled talking-head testimonial, partly at a port of entry and partly in front of DHS/CBP flags. Although the tweet uses recruitment language ('Find your purpose with us'), the video is a plain spoken testimonial with no music, no cinematic or trailer-style editing, so it is not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: My name is Monica Williams and this is Izzy; And not only do we help our employees; Find out more about what Izzy and I do
